summary: Northland Capital Markets  analyst Gus Richard   downgrades Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ:AMD) from Outperform to Market Perform and announces $260 price target.

headline: Intel Resets the Clock on the Chip Sector and the Weekend Complicated Everything Else
summary: Twenty-six years. That's how long it took Intel to take out the record it set at the peak of the dot-com bubble. On Friday, in a single session, it did exactly that, and dragged the entire semiconductor sector along for one of the most remarkable weeks in the index's history.

headline: SHOC: Concentrated Bet On The Semiconductor Supercycle
summary: The Strive US Semiconductor ETF offers concentrated exposure to leading US semiconductor stocks, with the top 10 holdings comprising 75% of assets. Learn more about the SHOC ETF here.
